turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Hello. I need to book a consultation for memory issues. My grandfather keeps forgetting things. He's 78.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: I understand. Memory concerns in elderly patients are best evaluated by our neurologist or geriatric specialist. Your grandfather's name?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Dr. Leena Verma handles memory and cognitive assessments. She has Thursday at 10 AM available. Shall I book for Balwant Singh?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Yes please. We'll bring his medical records.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Please do — any previous investigations or prescriptions would be very helpful. Balwant Singh, Thursday 10 AM with Dr. Verma. SMS coming to your number.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Thank you. I hope we get some clarity.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: I hope so too. You're doing the right thing by getting him checked.
